case_title: ISAKA YODA VS. FOUNG P HARTONO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YODA, ISAKA AS TO DEFENDANT HARTONO, FOUNG P
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SC-100 MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/13/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH STREET."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2017 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAR-08-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A JAPANESE INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF ISAKA YODA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOUNG HARTONO IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES AND AGREES TO THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED AT PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR JAPANESE INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. N APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ISAKA YODA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FOUND HARTONO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
